prompt: Change the display resolution to 'More Space' or 'Larger Text' (any non-current option). UI: System Settings > Displays > click a different size tile. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings open com.apple.preference.displays'`. Resolution state lives in com.apple.windowserver.displays.plist (TCC-protected); the eval prefers `system_profiler SPDisplaysDataType` for resolution; soft-passes if the Displays pane is open.
